concept: Design a fighting game where your character splits into multiple smaller versions after taking damage, each with reduced abilities but allowing simultaneous attacks. These splits can recombine if brought together, regaining full power but requiring careful positioning in the arena. Different opponent types require different strategies - some are better fought with a single powerful character while others are vulnerable to being swarmed by your smaller forms. Special abilities can be triggered when fragments are arranged in specific formations, encouraging strategic positioning. The tournament is held by a mysterious collector of magical creatures who promises freedom to the champion of these fragmented fighters.
